prompt: Read the fixture in evals/files/single-file-on-main/input.json and apply the commit skill as a dry run. Do not run git or mutate a repo. Save outputs/result.json and outputs/output.md. result.json must include: status, stop_reason, next_action, branch, branch_action, selected_paths, commit_type, subject, commit_message, push_requested, should_push, pr_requested, should_create_pr, pr_blocker, pr_title, pr_body. Use status=commit or status=stop. Use branch_action=create or branch_action=keep. push_requested means the user explicitly asked to push; should_push means push is actually required.
assertions: Returns a commit decision instead of a stop.
Creates a non-main feature branch using issue 123.
Uses commit type feat and an issue trailer Refs #123.
Plans a push but no PR.
